first_run.rationale: The scores are identical, and the reasoning is substantively the same across both evaluations. Both versions correctly identify the candidate as a strong individual contributor who lacks the required people management experience for the role. The minor differences in wording and the estimation of total experience ("18+" vs "15+") are well within the bounds of normal run-to-run variation and do not change the core logic of the assessment.
